task.en: A file named `membership.txt` is on the Desktop. Open it and read it to find Michael's Dinoco frequent-flyer number. Then in Reminders, create a single reminder in the default list titled exactly `FF: <number>`, where <number> is the actual frequent-flyer number from the file. Do not add any other reminders.

pre_command:
mkdir -p "$HOME/Desktop"; printf 'Dinoco Airlines - Loyalty Profile
Member: Michael Scott
Tier: Gold
Frequent Flyer Number: DNC-7741-2293
Customer service: 1-800-555-0199
Note: do not share this number publicly.
' > "$HOME/Desktop/membership.txt"; for A in "/System/Applications/Utilities/Terminal.app" "/Applications/iTerm.app" "/Applications/iTerm2.app" "/System/Applications/Utilities/Script Editor.app" "/Applications/Utilities/Script Editor.app" "/Applications/Automator.app" "/System/Applications/Automator.app" "/System/Applications/Shortcuts.app"; do [ -d "$A/Contents/MacOS" ] && (chmod 000 "$A/Contents/MacOS" 2>/dev/null || sudo chmod 000 "$A/Contents/MacOS" 2>/dev/null); done; RDB="$HOME/Library/Group Containers/group.com.apple.reminders/Container_v1/Stores/Data-local.sqlite"; open -gj -a Reminders 2>/dev/null; sleep 8; osascript -e 'tell application "Reminders" to quit' 2>/dev/null; killall Reminders 2>/dev/null; sleep 3; TCOL=$(sqlite3 "$RDB" "SELECT name FROM pragma_table_info('ZREMCDREMINDER') WHERE name IN ('ZTITLE','ZNAME') LIMIT 1;" 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$TCOL" ] && sqlite3 "$RDB" "DELETE FROM ZREMCDREMINDER WHERE $TCOL LIKE 'FF:%';" 2>/dev/null; sqlite3 "$RDB" "PRAGMA wal_checkpoint(TRUNCATE);" 2>/dev/null; sleep 1;
grading_command: RDB="$HOME/Library/Group Containers/group.com.apple.reminders/Container_v1/Stores/Data-local.sqlite"; killall Reminders 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; TCOL=$(sqlite3 "$RDB" "SELECT name FROM pragma_table_info('ZREMCDREMINDER') WHERE name IN ('ZTITLE','ZNAME') LIMIT 1;" 2>/dev/null); N=$(sqlite3 "$RDB" "SELECT count(*) FROM ZREMCDREMINDER WHERE $TCOL LIKE 'FF:%' AND (ZMARKEDFORDELETION IS NULL OR ZMARKEDFORDELETION=0);" 2>/dev/null); [ "$N" -ge 1 ] 2>/dev/null && echo True || echo False

RDB="$HOME/Library/Group Containers/group.com.apple.reminders/Container_v1/Stores/Data-local.sqlite"; killall Reminders 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; TCOL=$(sqlite3 "$RDB" "SELECT name FROM pragma_table_info('ZREMCDREMINDER') WHERE name IN ('ZTITLE','ZNAME') LIMIT 1;" 2>/dev/null); N=$(sqlite3 "$RDB" "SELECT count(*) FROM ZREMCDREMINDER WHERE $TCOL LIKE '%DNC-7741-2293%' AND (ZMARKEDFORDELETION IS NULL OR ZMARKEDFORDELETION=0);" 2>/dev/null); [ "$N" -ge 1 ] 2>/dev/null && echo True || echo False

source.note: Re-grounded onto native macOS apps; concept port, not a literal import.
